meta.title: Object Style
meta.description: Radius, elevation, and surface style tokens for the system.

hero.title: Object Style
hero.desc: Zoomable's design components are composed mostly of rounded shapes. Component boxes split between filled and outlined styles. The Worker Zoomable Design System uses no shadow for dimensional separation; elevation color signals hierarchy instead.

rounding.title: Rounding Guide
rounding.note: Rounding values range from 2 px to 6 px.
